Saturn so posited denotes sickness. The occupations of Mercury, Jupiter, or Venus will
confer abundant happiness and wealth.
43-44. ENEMIES.
128

If the 6th House is aspected by Saturn and occupied by Mars, the native will have fear from
enemies. Occupation, or aspect of benefics will keep one free from such fear. The number of
enemies (causing trouble) will correspond to the number of planets posited in the 6th House.
Rest of the related matters may be understood from the previous pages, (Ch. 30).
45 ABOUT THE 7th HOUSE. If Jupiter, Moon, Venus and Mercury be in the 7th, in any manner
(i.e. one of them, two, three, or all of them in the 7th), or other divisions falling in the 7th
House, or, if the 7th House be in aspect to these, one will procure a wife corresponding to the
planet/s and Rasi/s in question.
46. Should the 7th House contain malefics, or fall in malefic planets divisions, the wife of the
native will be destroyed (i.e.
